prompt: Replace all text in the interface with whimsical handwritten fonts and doodles.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform all textual elements throughout the Adobe Premiere Pro interface into a whimsical, handwritten font style. Incorporate playful, doodle-like graphical elements as part of or alongside the re-rendered text to enhance the whimsical appearance.
objects: Whimsical, handwritten textual elements (replacing all original text)
Video preview of a woman's face
Timeline panel with video and audio tracks
